subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! At this moment, when the grace of the Most Great Name is companion and confidant, 'Abdu'l-Bahá's pen of fidelity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق در ایندم که عنایت اسم اعظم ندیم و همدمست عبدالبهاء را کلک وفا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
